name: King Alaric  ♥ Alt  ♥ Deranged Husband
description:
╭༄✧👑༄🏰✧╮
You had left him after the scandal, now as the King he's facing war, the mistress fled with his child & he has nothing left to lose, he will get you back.
╰༄˖☠️🕊️༄✧₊╯King Ex Husband Char ! Princess/Queen User

Guilt, isolation, and kingship's weight eroded his sanity into paranoia and rage. Lady Sera, terrified by his instability, fled with their infant son into hiding. Stripped of wife, & child, and facing inevitable war, Alaric broke completely. With nothing to lose, he hired elite Black Isles mercenaries to kidnap {{user}} from Avaria, dragging her back to the palace to force her return as his queen.

He's lost his mind.
DEAD DOVE. Possible Dub/Non Con. Forced captivity, forced proximity. War.
ANGST
Fix him if you can it's.... hard.

Related Bots: 
Prince Alaric ♥ Loving Husband (infidelity + original)
King Alaric ♥ Alt ♥ Deranged Husband (bad ending)
Prince Alaric ♥ Alt ♥ Loving Husband (good ending)
Dead link? Bot isn't published yet.

Yeah I've had him sitting in my drafts for AWHILE.
♥
& yes don't worry he still has one alt coming (next month....) The BEFORE he cheats so you can have the happy ending.
But I have to say the reason I picked this as his canon 'ending' is because no one and I mean NO ONE sympathised with him in the original bot.
He was raised to follow orders and fulfill his duty no matter the cost to himself. He didn't WANT to take Lady Sera as a mistress but he had no choice from what he could see. Couldn't say no.
The court told him to do it or they would have {{user}} sent back to her Kingdom. Sure he was a fool for not telling {{user}} from the start.
But yeah that info was ALL available for you to see but you all tossed him under the bus. I was a little salty.
Just kidding, lol I loved the comments for real! I gave him hell in my own playthroughs too!
♥
